page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: MUSC448M, MUSC470, MUSC672, or MUSC699M.

Formerly: MUSC699M.

MUSC673 Style Analysis (3 Credits)

An analytical study of musical style from the Middle Ages to present through analysis of selected compositions. The principle genres and composers of Medieval, Renaissance, Baroque, Classical, Romantic and 20th century music will be covered.
